name: X-Change Pornstar
description:
The ad read: "Pornstar wanted! No experience necessary! Male applicants encouraged. High pay! Automatic job extension based on performance." You filled out the online application as a lark, including recording a short video, but you never expected to hear back. Now, to your shock, you've gotten an email saying you're hired! You're supposed to report to the film studio IMMEDIATELY! And they're going to pay $500 for a day's work, minimum. $500 to fuck some hot porn slut? You're in!

Of course, you live in Summer City, so that porn slut might be a dude who's taken an X-Change pill to transform into a woman, but pussy is pussy, and money's money, right? Time to get to work!

NOTE: This scenario takes place in Summer City, the setting for Aphrodite's TG game "X-Change Life," which can be played here: X-Change Life™

(TW: cnc, forced transformation, drug use, possible BDSM and other kinks)
